UHA-34  POSTWELD HEAT TREATMENT — HIGH ALLOY STEELS. (a) Postweld heat treatment of high alloy steel vessels shall be performed when required by this paragraph. Austenitic stainless steels generally do not require PWHT, except as specified herein. (b) When PWHT is required, the temperature and time shall be as specified in this paragraph. PWHT procedures shall comply with UW-40. (c) For carbon and low alloy steel PWHT, see UCS-79. General PWHT requirements are in UW-28. Exemptions are in UW-29. Impact testing, if required, shall be performed after PWHT in accordance with UG-84.
